title: Code Review Companion Farewell Envelope
description: End-of-session record from the long-running code-review companion. Written to $MINIH_OUTPUT_PATH on control:stop (or on idle_budget / timeout / error). Preserves Chainglass-specific finding fields from the one-shot reviewer (category enum, file:line range, suggestion vs recommendation) while adding the canonical companion session/exitReason/messageCounts and threading via ackOf.

startedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the companion booted.

endedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the farewell was written.

exitReason.description: Why the session ended. 'stop_requested' is the canonical happy path.

briefing.description: Plan / scope this session was briefed on (free-form summary the agent maintained).

filesReviewed.description: Aggregate list of files reviewed across the session.

domain.description: Domain this file belongs to (if applicable).

findings.description: All findings emitted during the session, including resolved ones (with status: 'resolved').

id.description: Finding ID stable for the session (e.g., F001, F002).

category.description: Maps to checklist letters in instructions.md (A=correctness/security/etc., B=domain, C=reinvention, D=testing, E=harness; constitution = P1-P7 violations).

file.description: File path with optional line range (e.g., 'apps/web/src/auth.ts:43-49').

status.description: Updated mid-session if a follow-up commit resolved the finding.

ackOf.description: Inbox message id of the outside task this finding answered (threading).

resolvedInSha.description: If status = resolved, the commit sha that resolved it.

domainCompliance.description: Aggregate domain compliance status across the session.

applicable.description: Whether docs/domains/registry.md exists and the domain checklist applied.

verdict.description: Overall session verdict. Optional — present when the session asked for a verdict at any point.

summary.description: 3-7 sentence recap of the whole session: themes that emerged, notable findings, debt left open, verdict.

workedWell.description: What about the coordination loop, the harness CLI, or the project's tooling was smooth?

confusing.description: What required trial-and-error? What information was hard to find?

magicWand.description: ONE concrete change that would make code-review-via-companion easier next time. Be specific.

magicWandTarget.description: Which system the magicWand targets. 'project' = Chainglass codebase/tools; 'minih' = the agent runner; 'coordination' = inbox/state vocabulary.

cliDiscoverability.description: How discoverable were the harness + minih CLI commands? (Optional.)
